headlines.title: Israeli air strikes hit Lebanese city of Tyre after Iranian warning
headlines.summary: Residents of Tyre are evacuating after Israeli strikes. Lebanese media report at least eight people killed. Tensions escalate between Israel and Iran.

headlines.title: Netanyahu and Trump at odds over Iran war they started together
headlines.summary: Tensions emerge between Israeli PM Netanyahu and President Trump regarding the ongoing conflict with Iran.

headlines.title: Philippines earthquake death toll rises with hundreds of aftershocks
headlines.summary: Dozens dead and hundreds injured following a 7.8 magnitude earthquake in the Philippines. Officials warn death toll could rise as aftershocks continue.

headlines.title: ICC suspends top prosecutor Karim Khan over misconduct allegations
headlines.summary: International Criminal Court suspends chief prosecutor Karim Khan after investigating sexual misconduct allegations. Khan denies all allegations.

headlines.title: Nuclear weapons spending rose 20% to $119 billion in 2025
headlines.summary: Report by International Campaign to Abolish Nuclear Weapons shows world's nine nuclear-armed states increased spending by almost a fifth.

headlines.title: US helicopter crashes near Strait of Hormuz; pilots rescued by sea drone
headlines.summary: An uncrewed vessel rescued two crew members of an Apache helicopter that went down near the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: Former Supreme Court justice Louise Arbour becomes Canada's governor general
headlines.summary: Louise Arbour appointed as Canada's governor general, representing King Charles III.

headlines.title: 300 migrants bound for UK kidnapped, threatened with kidney removal
headlines.summary: Iraqi Kurds captured by militia demanding $5,000 ransom per person. Part of growing human trafficking crisis.

headlines.title: Russia's fuel crisis intensifies as Ukraine steps up strikes
headlines.summary: Kyiv's strikes on occupied territories making it difficult for Moscow to provide military and civilian supplies.

headlines.title: Hulk Hogan died of natural causes
headlines.summary: Florida officials confirm wrestling icon Hulk Hogan died of natural causes.
